title: Norwegian Lamb Stew
description: A hearty, comforting stew made with lamb, Norwegian ingredients, and a touch of herbal flavor.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the lamb on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the lamb from the pot and set aside.
Add more oil if necessary and sauté the root vegetables until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the herbs and cook for 1 minute.
Add the stew broth, red wine (if using), and browned lamb to the pot.
Bring to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
